title: hydrocotyle javanica var. siamica
intro: Hydrocotyle javanica var. siamica, also known as Thai pennywort or Thai water spinach, is a plant species that belongs to the hydrocotyle genus. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing cholesterol levels, and improving cognitive function, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. Hydrocotyle javanica var. siamica is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and capsules, and is also consumed fresh in salads and as a vegetable.
